users.name: System Administrator
users.title: System Administrator
users.summary: Default system administrator with full product management access
users.description: This is the default administrator account with capabilities to add, edit, and delete products in the voting system. This admin user is the only one with product management permissions by default.

users.name: Test User
users.title: Test Account
users.summary: Default test user account for voting
users.description: This is a test user account for development and testing. This user can vote but cannot manage products.
